intent.summary: Scope schema versioning by (domain + url_pattern) to avoid cross-page-type bumps and harden wa-sqlite stability.
intent.whyNow: Domain-wide schema bumps caused small page variations to affect unrelated page types; concurrent DB ops could crash wa-sqlite.
nonGoals: No per-site custom mapping UI for url_pattern yet

decisions.title: Schema bucket key
decisions.rationale: Page-type streams (e.g. /products vs /users) evolve independently and should not interfere.
risks: url_pattern is heuristic; may need per-domain overrides later

decisions.title: wa-sqlite stability strategy
decisions.decision: Serialize all DB operations through a single lock.
decisions.rationale: Extension popup is low-throughput; serialization avoids intermittent binding/OOB crashes under concurrent calls.

evidence.notes: E2E covers /products and /users buckets; stability hardened by serialized DB access.

followUps: Consider adding per-domain url_pattern mapping rules if heuristic buckets are insufficient
